category.name: Connection
category.description: Default HTTP target for relative paths and raw request strings.

setting.name: Default Host
setting.description: IP address or DNS name used when an HTTP string is not a full http:// URL.

setting.name: Default Port
setting.description: TCP port used when an HTTP string does not include a port.

setting.name: Default Method
setting.description: Method used when the HTTP string is a path or URL. Raw HTTP requests keep their own method.

setting.name: Default Headers
setting.description: Optional headers added to generated requests. Use \r\n between headers. Host and Connection are generated automatically.

setting.name: Debug Trace
setting.description: Print detailed driver messages to the RTI system log.

category.name: Configured HTTP Strings
category.description: How many configured HTTP strings should appear as RTI commands.

setting.name: Number of HTTP strings
setting.description: Select how many configured commands to expose.

category.name: HTTP String 1
category.description: Enter /path, http://host:port/path, or a complete HTTP request. Use \r\n escapes for raw request lines.

setting.name: Name
setting.description: Command name shown in RTI programming.

setting.name: HTTP String
setting.description: Path, URL, or full raw HTTP request string to send.

category.name: HTTP String 2
category.description: Enter /path, http://host:port/path, or a complete HTTP request. Use \r\n escapes for raw request lines.

setting.name: Name
setting.description: Command name shown in RTI programming.

setting.name: HTTP String
setting.description: Path, URL, or full raw HTTP request string to send.

category.name: HTTP String 3
category.description: Enter /path, http://host:port/path, or a complete HTTP request. Use \r\n escapes for raw request lines.

setting.name: Name
setting.description: Command name shown in RTI programming.

setting.name: HTTP String
setting.description: Path, URL, or full raw HTTP request string to send.
